title: Veritio Evidence Export Bundle v1 (vevb-1)
description: Portable, offline-verifiable export container: a signed manifest indexing tamper-evident record files. See spec/export-bundle.md for the normative construction and verification rules.

files.description: Bundle-relative path -> exact serialized file payload. Keys map 1:1 with manifest.files; each value is the exact bytes hashed into that manifest entry.

createdAt.description: Caller-supplied build timestamp. The builder never reads a clock, so this is deterministic per input.

chainScope.description: Chain-verification claim of this bundle. Absent means 'full' (strict start-at-one gapless chains). 'windowed' allows a mid-chain entry per tenant with strict linkage after it; 'filtered' proves per-record integrity and strictly-increasing sequences with strict linkage only between sequence-adjacent records. See export-bundle.md § Chain scopes.

filters.description: Content filters a 'filtered' bundle was produced under, declared so consumers can see what was deliberately excluded. Only valid when chainScope is 'filtered'.

files.description: Every record file in the bundle. Sorted by path (UTF-16 code-unit order) before rootHash is computed.

path.description: Bundle-relative file path and the stable sort key for rootHash.

rootHash.description: sha256Hex(canonicalJson(files sorted by path)) — binds the file set, order-insensitively.

annex.description: Summary of attached evidence packs; each pack also has its own file entry under annex/<packId>.json.

packId.description: ASCII printable only. packId is embedded in a file path and participates in path ordering, so its byte space is pinned to ASCII to keep rootHash ordering unambiguous.

signaturePublicKeyFingerprint.description: Present only on a signed bundle. Fingerprint of the signing key; the signature covers this field.

publicKeyFingerprint.description: Lowercase-hex SHA-256 of the raw public key bytes. Must equal manifest.signaturePublicKeyFingerprint.

signature.description: Base64 (standard alphabet, with padding) Ed25519 signature over the manifest digest payload.
